# Contributing to dom-replay

Thank you for your interest in contributing to dom-replay! We welcome contributions from the community.

## Getting Started

Please see our [main contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for detailed information on:

- Development setup
- Code style and conventions
- Testing guidelines
- Pull request process
- Release process
